summary: Grok 3 retired by xAI — the slug still resolves but requests now redirect to and are billed as Grok 4.3.

analyst_note.author: Zerg AI
analyst_note.text: xAI's retirement cycle is the most aggressive of any major provider — Grok 3 lived roughly 11 months, and the redirect-instead-of-error approach means dependents silently start paying Grok 4.3 prices. Compare Anthropic's policy of a one-year retirement floor announced in advance. If your stack pins xAI models, treat every release announcement as a deprecation notice for the previous generation.
